outcome: `BANDIT-041` landed and closed out the bootstrap-gap chore for `BANDIT-GAP-LAYERED-RISK-CLASSIFICATION`. The work adds a repo-native Layered Risk Classification Gate policy, layered risk template, focused validation, `bandit risk-classification validate [--json]`, `bandit validate` integration, and auto-land-check consumption so review-depth, operator-supervision, and auto-landing decisions use hard exclusions, never-auto-landable surfaces, blast-radius signals, static-analysis signals, source trust, input quarantine, supply-chain state, and smell-trigger inputs together rather than smell triggers alone. Stage 4 pre-PR CodeRabbit evidence passed with no findings, Local Qwen returned non_blocking findings with PM disposition, Stage 5 landing verdict and local-record landing action evidence are recorded, the risk-classification landing blocker was repaired with explicit release-authorized evidence, and no product, UAT, policy override, business tradeoff, explicit cost/risk override, supply-chain gate implementation, dependency or lockfile policy, live reviewer routing, paid reviewer routing, scheduler authority, claim/worktree authority, installed global skill edit, external service integration, PR/CI workflow, or cockpit UI scope was introduced.
what_worked: The strategic-review source artifacts and resolved Input Quarantine Gate gave this chore the right dependency order before layered risk became an auto-landing input.

Focused RED tests captured missing classification evidence, smell-trigger-only decisions, never-auto-landable auto-land attempts, high-risk signal escalation, unknown trust or quarantine state, missing supply-chain disposition, malformed review depth, operator-supervision routing, refusal output, and complete low-risk acceptance.

The implementation kept risk classification explicit in repo-native policy, template, evidence files, validation, and auto-land-check consumption rather than moving authority into reviewers, generated context, cockpit state, scheduler behavior, or model routing.

The Stage 5 landing blocker proved the new gate fails closed: local-record landing refused until explicit layered risk-classification evidence was registered for `BANDIT-041`, then passed after the evidence and review subject hash were refreshed.

lessons_and_dispositions.lesson: Review-depth, operator-supervision, and auto-landing decisions need layered risk classification, not smell-list-only safety.
lessons_and_dispositions.rationale: `BANDIT-041` adds the Layered Risk Classification Gate policy, template, validator, CLI command, validation wiring, auto-land-check consumption, focused tests, review evidence, landing verdict, landing action, and retrospective closeout; `.bandit/bootstrap-gaps.json` marks `BANDIT-GAP-LAYERED-RISK-CLASSIFICATION` resolved during closeout.

lessons_and_dispositions.lesson: Auto-landing eligibility must require an explicit release-authorized classification decision, not just the existence of passing tests and reviewer agreement.
lessons_and_dispositions.rationale: The Stage 5 blocker and repair validate the intended fail-closed contract: landing refused until `.bandit/policy/risk-classification.json` registered current `BANDIT-041` evidence, and the repaired evidence then made auto-land-check pass.

lessons_and_dispositions.lesson: Smell triggers are useful risk inputs, but missing or unknown source-trust, input-quarantine, supply-chain, static-analysis, or blast-radius signals must not become green defaults.
lessons_and_dispositions.rationale: The risk-classification validator now rejects smell-trigger-only authority, missing required signal groups, unknown source-trust or input-quarantine state, and missing supply-chain state instead of letting absence of a smell match lower review depth.

lessons_and_dispositions.lesson: The dedicated Supply-Chain Gate still needs its own convention for supply-chain-sensitive surfaces and not-applicable evidence.
lessons_and_dispositions.rationale: Local Qwen's accepted non-blocking supply-chain-state convention finding is routed into `BANDIT-GAP-SUPPLY-CHAIN-GATE`, which is already the next queued bootstrap gap and must define dependency, lockfile, package-manager script, CI/release workflow, agent-skill, fetched-prompt, and external tool-install evidence.

Final CodeRabbit, Local Qwen, landing, validation, gap listing, risk-classification validation, input-quarantine validation, auto-land-check, land-check, and cockpit status evidence passed.
